profile.title: Profile Snapshot
profile.description: Latest account summary for this user.

context.title: Device & Activity
context.description: Last known locale, device, IP, and browser fingerprint.

funnel.title: Four-Stage Funnel
funnel.description: Connect this user from signup to first successful generation, checkout started, and paid.

context_events.title: Recent Context Events
context_events.description: Showing the latest {limit} auth, checkout, and AI request events.

webhook_events.title: Recent Payment Webhooks
webhook_events.description: Showing the latest {limit} payment webhook audit records tied to this user. Click the event ID to inspect the full trail.

webhook_detail.title: Webhook Event Detail
webhook_detail.replay_detected: This event was received {deliveries} times, including {replays} replay deliveries.
webhook_detail.replay_clean: Only one delivery has been recorded for this event so far.
webhook_detail.timeline_empty: No attempt timeline is available for this webhook yet.
webhook_detail.timeline_partial: Historical data only reconstructed the latest snapshot. {missing} earlier delivery attempts are not recoverable from the old summary-only schema.

event.title: Event Snapshot
event.description: Core identity for this webhook event and its latest delivery state.

timeline.title: Delivery Timeline
timeline.description: Showing {count} recorded delivery attempts for this webhook.

replay.title: Replay Snapshot
replay.description: How many times this event arrived and when the last duplicate was seen.

processing.title: Processing Snapshot
processing.description: The latest processing window, completion time, and measured duration.

request.title: Request Snapshot
request.description: The latest request-level IP, path, and browser fingerprint captured at the edge.

binding.title: Binding Snapshot
binding.description: The user, order, and subscription references currently tied to this webhook.

error.title: Error Detail
error.description: The latest error message and stack trace kept for troubleshooting.

payload.title: Raw Payload
payload.description: The stored webhook payload after verification and normalization.
